body.title: CLOSED: Phase 5: Relocate discord_bot.py code to agent_datacenter device
body.result: discord bot code relocated to devices/discord_bot/bot.py; DiscordBotDevice Phase 5 manages thread; discord_bot.start() removed from Igor boot
body.description:
DiscordBotDevice (devices/discord_bot/device.py) currently just health-monitors the bot embedded in Igor's process (Phase 4). Phase 5 moves the actual bot code from wild_igor/igor/network/discord_bot.py into devices/discord_bot/ so Discord runs as a standalone agent_datacenter process, not embedded in Igor. Igor's main.py removes the discord_bot.start() call at line 745.

**Affected files:** devices/discord_bot/device.py (implement actual bot), wild_igor/igor/network/discord_bot.py (delete after), wild_igor/igor/main.py (remove discord_bot.start())
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no-TheIgors-imports from agent_datacenter
**Scope boundary:** In scope: copy+adapt discord_bot.py to run standalone as a device, update DiscordBotDevice to manage it, remove from Igor. Out of scope: changing Discord API, adding inbound routing.
**Test plan:** Discord messages still send after relocation. Igor boots without discord_bot import. DiscordBotDevice health shows healthy.
